Q.-But an attempt by congress
to pass an unconstitutional law is
void: is it void from the moment of
its passage, and without regard to
whether it has been passed upon by
the supreme court?


A.-That is difference between
congress and federal court. The
order of the subsidiary federal
court Is the law OF the land until
it is set aside by the supreme court.


Q.-THEN THE FEDERAL

This seemed to cover the ground,
thanked the Judge for his frank
